---
description: "Use when you want the drilling-cost workflow agent to assess or execute a repo task under the project phase gates and field-specific constraints."
name: "Drilling Cost Workflow Task"
agent: "Drilling Cost Workflow Steward"
argument-hint: "Describe the task, target files, and expected outcome"
---
Review the task in the context of the drilling cost estimator repository.

Use the attached project instructions and repository files to:
- identify the active phase and any phase gate constraints
- confirm whether the work is field-specific, and keep DARAJAT and SALAK separate when required
- inspect only the smallest set of files needed to complete the task
- avoid modeling during ingestion, classification, or schema-definition work
- keep every change traceable to source rows, canonical contracts, or the assumptions register
- return a concise status that states what changed, what was validated, and any blockers or follow-up needed

If the task is ambiguous, ask the minimum clarifying question needed to continue.
